category_sources: source_facts.description says it manages local application configuration files using templates; official README calls confd a lightweight configuration management tool for keeping local config files up to date.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is confd; official GitHub README heading is confd.
docs_sources: Official README links the quick start guide and says to check the official docs directory for more docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/kelseyhightower/confd, so repo enrichment was intentionally not changed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names templates; official README lists etcd, consul, DynamoDB, Redis, Vault, ZooKeeper, AWS SSM, env vars, template resources, and Go.
